refillRate.title: Refill rate (tokens)
refillRate.description: Number of tokens added to the bucket each refill period. Used when set; otherwise the dynamic refill rate is evaluated.

dynamicRefillRate.title: Refill rate (dynamic)
dynamicRefillRate.description: EL expression for the number of tokens added each period, evaluated per request. Used only when the static refill rate is not set.

refillPeriodTime.title: Refill period
refillPeriodTime.description: Length of the refill period, combined with the unit below. For example, refill rate 100 with period 1 MINUTE adds 100 tokens per minute.

refillPeriodTimeUnit.title: Refill period unit
refillPeriodTimeUnit.description: Time unit of the refill period.

burstCapacity.title: Burst capacity
burstCapacity.description: Maximum number of tokens the bucket can accumulate. A request consumes one token; requests are rejected with 429 when the bucket is empty. Used when set; otherwise the dynamic burst capacity is evaluated.

dynamicBurstCapacity.title: Burst capacity (dynamic)
dynamicBurstCapacity.description: EL expression for the burst capacity, evaluated per request. Used only when the static burst capacity is not set.

key.title: Key
key.description: Key to identify a consumer against whom the rate-limiting is applied. Leave empty to use the default behavior (plan/subscription pair). Supports EL.

useKeyOnly.title: Use key only
useKeyOnly.description: When enabled, only the configured key identifies the consumer (the plan/subscription pair is ignored).

addHeaders.title: Add response headers
addHeaders.description: Add X-Rate-Limit-Limit, X-Rate-Limit-Remaining, X-Rate-Limit-Reset and (on throttling) Retry-After headers to the HTTP response.

errorStrategy.title: Error strategy
errorStrategy.description: Strategy applied to handle internal errors. The default FALLBACK_PASS_TROUGH fails open: while the rate-limit store is unavailable every request passes through and throttling is disabled. Use BLOCK_ON_INTERNAL_ERROR to fail closed if a store outage must not bypass the limit.

enumLabelMap.BLOCK_ON_INTERNAL_ERROR: Block queries in case of internal failure
enumLabelMap.FALLBACK_PASS_TROUGH: Accept queries in case of internal failure (default behavior)
